title: Mace's Enchants
description: The mod is a whole collection of enchants from all of my other mods, look at those mods more info on the enchants, and there's an extra in here as well.
body:
This mod is just all of the enchants that i have made EVER.

Heres one i made for this mod to make it a teeny bit unique.

**--Adapt--**

- Sword, axe, mace, and spear enchantment. Up to level III.
- Each level grants +1 attack damage and +0.3 attack speed (shown directly on the item tooltip).
- At max level: +3 damage, +0.9 attack speed on top of the weapon's base stats.
- Obtainable from the enchanting table and villager trades.

Every other enchantment in this mod is ported over from my other enchant mods, check those for their individual features.

**Made by MaceMeta**
